role_title: Staff Product Manager, Lyft Business Growth

location.office_time_required: 3 days per week on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays

level_signals: Set multi-year growth strategy and built shared infrastructure
Compensation range $176K-$220K base consistent with Staff IC at Lyft

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of product management experience, with a meaningful portion owning growth, lifecycle, or funnel work at scale.
must_haves.qualifier: with meaningful portion in growth, lifecycle, or funnel work at scale

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Track record of measurable, durable impact on acquisition, activation, or retention metrics that you can defend.
Demonstrated ownership of broad, ambiguous problem areas that span teams. You have set a multi-year growth strategy and built shared infrastructure that compounded across products.
Quantitative rigor and experimentation discipline. You think in funnels, cohorts, and growth loops. You size opportunities, design clean A/B tests, and read results without overclaiming.
Fluency with the modern growth stack: lifecycle and CRM platforms, attribution, product analytics (Amplitude, Mixpanel, or similar), and experimentation tooling.
Comfortable in B2B, B2B2C, or marketplace contexts with multiple customer types whose interests do not always align.
Exceptional communication and influence at every altitude, from a growth engineer debating instrumentation to a VP sponsoring the revenue target. You move organizations to act.

scope.surface: Lyft Business Growth — acquisition, activation, lifecycle/CRM stack, attribution, experimentation, growth loops across Lyft Business portfolio (admin portal, rider app, partner surfaces)
scope.business_model: B2B and B2B2C; transportation solutions for organizations including business travel, employee commutes, courtesy rides, and non-emergency medical trips
core_responsibilities: Define the growth strategy across the Lyft Business funnel: acquisition, activation, conversion, retention, and expansion
Build the growth stack: lifecycle and CRM messaging, in-app activation primitives, attribution, and product analytics
Architect the journey from awareness through landing in the admin portal, rider app, and partner surfaces
Design and operate growth loops that convert acquired customers into channels for new acquisition
Set the experimentation cadence, the bar for shipping, and the standard for readouts
Translate funnel data, cohort behavior, and experiment results into quarterly prioritization
Represent Lyft Business Growth in exec reviews and cross-org forums

compensation.equity_form: potential equity offering mentioned alongside bonus

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($176K-$220K base) with equity and bonus mentioned
Clear product surface and ownership area — growth stack, lifecycle, funnel across Lyft Business
Lyft Business described as 'fastest-growing and most profitable unit' — suggests strategic importance
Hybrid schedule explicitly defined (Mon/Wed/Thu in office) with 4 weeks remote flexibility per year
JD provides specific north-star responsibilities rather than vague platitudes
red_flags: No visa sponsorship information provided — unclear for international candidates
San Francisco area only for stated compensation range; other locations not addressed
Broad, ambiguous scope spanning multiple verticals and cross-org influence may indicate unclear organizational boundaries
No explicit nice-to-haves listed — harder to calibrate on stretch qualifications

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Staff' and comp range)
seniority.manages_people (inferred false; no people management signals in JD)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
ambiguities: No nice-to-haves section exists in the JD — all experience bullets are treated as hard must-haves. Some ('Comfortable in B2B/B2B2C') could arguably be soft; retained as hard given unconditional language.
Compensation range is stated only for San Francisco area; other locations may differ but are not specified.
